Welcome to Electronics Engineering

The Department of Electronics Engineering at UGIP Nainital is dedicated to fostering innovation and technical expertise.

Established with a focus on core electronics technologies, our department has been producing highly skilled professionals who actively contribute to telecommunications, IoT, and embedded systems.

Our comprehensive curriculum is thoughtfully designed to meet the evolving demands of the modern tech industry, supported by advanced communication laboratories, highly experienced faculty, and hands-on practical training.

👁️

Our Vision

To be a center of excellence in Electronics Engineering education, producing innovative professionals capable of adapting to rapid technological advancements in communication and embedded systems.

Curriculum Overview

Our 3-year Diploma program spans across 6 semesters. The first year builds strong engineering fundamentals, leading into advanced specializations.

Sem 1English & Communication Skills
Sem 1Applied Mathematics – I
Sem 1Applied Physics – I
Sem 1Applied Chemistry – I
Sem 1Computer Fundamentals
Sem 2Applied Mathematics – II
Sem 2Environmental Science & Energy
Sem 2Engineering Graphics
Sem 2General Workshop Practice

Delve into specialized subjects covering digital electronics, microprocessors, communication systems, IoT architecture, hands-on project work, and mandatory industrial training across Semesters 3 to 6, structured strictly as per the UBTER curriculum.

View Full Syllabus on UBTER

Career Opportunities

Our graduates are highly sought after and find rewarding employment in diverse roles across both public and private sectors.

Electronics Engineer BSNL / ISRO IoT Developer Embedded Systems Telecom Engineer Service Engineer PCB Designer
View Placement Details

Labs & Facilities

📡

Communication Lab

Advanced lab featuring AM/FM modulation kits, spectrum analyzers, and modern signal processing equipment.

🤖

Embedded Systems Lab

Dedicated workspace with Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and PLC kits for embedded programming and intricate IoT projects.

💡

Digital Electronics Lab

Fully equipped with logic gates, flip-flop circuits, microprocessor trainers, and a wide array of digital ICs.
